section.heading: Classification of defense environmental cleanup as capital asset projects or operations activities

content.p: The Assistant Secretary of Energy for Environmental Management, in consultation with other appropriate officials of the Department of Energy, shall establish requirements for the classification of defense environmental cleanup projects as capital asset projects or operations activities.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 119–60, div. C, title XXXI, § 3111(a), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1386.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 3123(a) of Pub. L. 116–283, which was set out in a note under section 2581 of Title 50, War and National Defense, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(8).
